title: Officials: Public needs more time to evaluate maritime uses for Brooklyn Marine Terminal
summary:
Elected officials and stakeholders say the release of the RFEI responses is too late, coming just days before the Tuesday, March 31 deadline.

The post Officials: Public needs more time to evaluate maritime uses for Brooklyn Marine Terminal appeared first on Brooklyn Eagle.
